01-01.title: NEW YEAR'S DAY
01-01.text: Hoot! A fresh start for fresh words. Let's make this year majestic!

02-14.title: VALENTINE'S DAY
02-14.text: Hoot hoot! Spread the love through beautiful English today.

04-22.title: EARTH DAY
04-22.text: The world is wide and full of wonders. Let's learn to describe them all!

10-31.title: HALLOWEEN
10-31.text: Don't be scared of big words! They are just friendly giants.

12-25.title: CHRISTMAS
12-25.text: May your holiday be filled with joy and wonderful conversations.

12-31.title: NEW YEAR'S EVE
12-31.text: Reflect on your growth. You've soared higher than ever this year!

2026-04-28.title: THE VOWL ASCENSION
2026-04-28.text: Today, your journey takes a majestic leap forward with the new Quest Arena!

fallbacks: Hoot! Every mistake is a step toward mastery. Don't stop soaring!
Confidence isn't the absence of mistakes; it's the courage to keep speaking.
Small steps lead to great heights. Your 10-minute session today is a victory!
Your voice has power. The more you use it, the stronger it becomes. Hoot hoot!
Learning a language is like growing wings. It takes time, but the view is worth it.
A wise owl knows: Persistence beats talent every single time. Stay steady!
You don't need to be perfect to be amazing. Speak with your heart today!
Your brain is a majestic engine. Fuel it with new words and watch it soar!
Every word you learn is a new feather in your wings. Keep soaring!
Success is the sum of small efforts, repeated day in and day out. Hoot!
The world is waiting to hear your story. Let's find the words to tell it.
Be proud of how far you've come. Your future self is already cheering for you!
Language is the key to new worlds. Today, you are unlocking a majestic one.
Hoot! Your dedication today is the magic that builds your tomorrow.
Don't worry about being 'fast'. Worry about being 'forever'. Keep your streak alive!
One day you will speak English without even thinking about it. Today is the day you build that future.
Hoot hoot! Your accent is a map of your journey. Wear it with pride!
The best way to predict your future is to create it. Start with one majestic word today.
Speaking a new language is the ultimate superpower. You're becoming a hero, hoot!
A year from now, you'll wish you started today. Good thing you're already here!
The only bad practice session is the one that didn't happen. You're doing great!
Hoot! Your journey is unique. Don't compare your Chapter 1 to someone else's Chapter 20.
Words are seeds. Plant them today, and watch your conversations bloom tomorrow!
Your majestic adventure has no limits. The only boundary is your own imagination. Keep flying!
